schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The “Map Approval through UDAY App” is implemented by the Haridwar - Roorkee Development Authority under Housing Department, Government of Uttarakhand. It aims to simplify and expedite the process of residential property map creation and approval for all landowners in Haridwar district through mobile app.
schemeContent.benefits_md: All landowners in Haridwar district can avail themselves of the benefit of map approval through the UDAY mobile app.
schemeContent.briefDescription: It aims to simplify and expedite the process of residential property map creation and approval for all landowners in Haridwar district through mobile app.

children.text: The “Map Approval through UDAY App” is implemented by the Haridwar - Roorkee Development Authority under Housing Department, Government of Uttarakhand. It aims to simplify and expedite the process of residential property map creation and approval for all landowners in Haridwar district through mobile app.
All landowners in Haridwar district can avail themselves of the benefit of map approval through the UDAY mobile app.

Landowners in Haridwar district have been provided with the UDAY Mobile App to simplify the process of map preparation and approval. Under this system, residential maps are prepared by the authority’s architects free of charge, and support is provided to assist landowners in getting their maps approved.

applicationProcess.process_md: Landowners in Haridwar district have been provided with the UDAY Mobile App to simplify the process of map preparation and approval. Under this system, residential maps are prepared by the authority’s architects free of charge, and support is provided to assist landowners in getting their maps approved.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. All landowners in the Haridwar district of Uttarakhand are eligible.

children.text: All landowners in the Haridwar district of Uttarakhand are eligible.
